response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed video, identified dialogue section, followed by a vocal performance of "愛して愛して愛して" by Kikuo. Extracted metadata from on-screen text. Performed search '"愛して愛して愛して" Kikuo Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics and provided a representation of them.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dialogue segment between two VTubers (Akai Haato and another) followed by a vocal performance of the song "Aishite Aishite Aishite" by Kikuo.

scenes.description: Two VTuber characters (Akai Haato and another) engaging in dialogue about their upcoming performance. The text #赤井はあと離誕祭2025 is visible in the top right.

The two characters perform the song "Aishite Aishite Aishite" by Kikuo, with on-screen text confirming the title and composer. The stage features a gothic, purple-themed aesthetic with chains and candles.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
遥か遠い遠い昔　巻かれた首輪
人が欲しい　人が欲しいと叫ぶ呪いの首輪
心ないで　捨てないで
どこも行かないで
強く締める　悪魔に締める
人がいない　いないと
... (Lyrics continue)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A collar wrapped around me in the distant, distant past
A cursed collar that cries, "I want humans, I want humans"
Don't have a heart, don't throw me away
Don't go anywhere
Tighten it strongly, tighten it by the devil
There are no humans, there are no humans
... (Lyrics continue)

(Translation note: The song deals with themes of desperate need for love and obsession.)
